overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a red flying aerodyne vehicle navigating through the dense skyscrapers of Night City before ascending over the coastal bay. The clip transitions from urban canyon flying to high-altitude flight with bright sunlight and ocean views.

agents.ego_description: flying a red and white aerodyne vehicle through narrow gaps between downtown skyscrapers

entered.detail: large circular sports arena with metallic roof visible on the city outskirts
tall chimneys emitting white smoke plumes among the buildings
large glowing pink and red advertisement displays on building facades
dense collection of futuristic high-rise buildings with reflective glass surfaces
multi-level road infrastructure winding between buildings

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a flying vehicle navigating through the dense urban canyon of a futuristic city. Tall glass skyscrapers surround the path with industrial smokestacks and neon holographic billboards visible. The camera follows the red aerodyne as it weaves between buildings at high speed.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition from downtown to coastal airspace

events.description: flying vehicle ascends above the skyscraper line revealing open sky and distant horizon
coastal bay and ocean become visible to the left as the vehicle banks over the city

agents.ego_description: ascending steeply and banking left to navigate over the city toward the coastal area

entered.detail: blue ocean water with coastal inlets visible beyond the city edge
distant brown mountain ridges forming the horizon line
tall vertical structure with multiple holographic displays and corporate logos
industrial structures standing in the water beyond the coastline

segments.scene_description: The vehicle ascends above the skyscraper line into open sky, revealing a coastal bay and distant mountains. The dense downtown buildings fall away to the right as the camera banks left, showing offshore platforms in the water and a tall floating advertisement tower passing by on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: high altitude coastal airspace over the bay

events.description: intense sunlight creates lens flare as the vehicle faces toward the sun over the water

agents.ego_description: flying straight and level at high altitude over the open coastal waters

segments.scene_description: Flying high above the coastal bay with the city now far behind, the vehicle cruises over open water toward the horizon. Offshore platforms are visible below while intense sunlight creates glare. The urban landscape has faded into the distance, leaving mostly water and sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a claustrophobic urban canyon into a vast, sun-drenched coastal expanse. It begins by weaving a red aerodyne at high speed between towering glass skyscrapers, industrial smokestacks, and glowing holographic billboards. As the vehicle ascends above the skyline, the dense downtown architecture falls away to the right while the camera banks left to reveal a coastal bay and distant mountains. The scene then opens further as the vehicle passes a tall floating advertisement tower, shifting from the shadows of the city to the intense glare of high-altitude sunlight. Finally, the urban landscape fades into the distance as the camera cruises over open water and offshore platforms toward the horizon.
